name: Creole Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cooking spray and Creole Sauce in a large bowl.
2. Stir until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into a loaf and place it in an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 3 inch loaf pan coated with cooking spray.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
5. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes.
6. Invert the meatloaf onto a serving plate and pour Creole Sauce over the top.
7. Cut the meatloaf into 6 slices to serve.
From: All New Cookbook For Diabetics And Their Families
Yield: 6 servings (Each serving amount: 1 slice of meat loaf with 1/3 cup sauce)
Exchanges: 3 lean meat, 1 vegetable
Cholesterol: 96 mg; Calories: 160; Carbohydrates: 7 gm; Protein: 25 gm; Fat: 7 gm; Fiber: Tr.; Sodium: 400 mg
